fields.helpText: The ID is automatically generated by the software when a new  record is created.
The federal vendor associated with the agreement.  If a vendor has an active agreement on file, the system will force all payments to that vendor to be made via IPAC.
The fiscal year is used to identify the applicable period for  an agreement record.  It is displayed as an identifier to assist in selection of the appropriate record.

Status of the record.  The NEW status is only set by the  system and it indicates a record that is partially entered and is missing some required fields. Once all required fields have been filed, the status is automatically changed to ACTIVE.
The description is an identifier.  It is displayed during  selection of an agreement to assist the user to make an appropriate choice.
The sharing agreement number that is related to the IPAC vendor  agreement.
The customer ALC is the agency location code (ALC) of the  government agency that will be paid.

The Treasury Account Symbol (TAS) for the government agency that  will receive the IPAC transaction. This is a composite field which contains 9 different component fields. Each part of the TAS must be specified according to the following character position layout.     Pos#  Field Name  -----  ----------   1-2   Sub-level Prefix (SP): "  " 2 spaces   3-5   Allocation Transfer Agency ID (ATA): "   " 3 spaces   6-8   Agency Identifier (AID): "097" is for DoD/DFAS   9-12  Beginning Period of Availab

The Treasury Account Symbol (TAS) for the government agency that  will send the IPAC transaction. Please enter '036' as the Agency ID Number for the VA. Central Fee will construct the full Sender TAS based on the Obligation Number received in the payment batch transmission.
Please enter the DoD Fiscal Station Number. This station number  will be used in the IPAC field called 'FSN/AAA/ADSN'. Do NOT enter the VA station number here.
Please enter the DoD Obligating Document Number. This is the  internal accounting document number of the billing agency.
Name of VA employee that should be contacted if there are  questions about the IPAC transaction.  This value will be included in the IPAC transaction.
Phone number for the station contact name.
E-mail address for the VA employee who is the station contact.
Please enter '097' as the Agency ID Number for the DoD/DFAS.  The actual Complete Line of Accounting will be entered into the DESC. OF GOODS & SERVICES field.

This is a 200 character free text field. Please enter the full and  complete Line of Accounting (LOA) including the FSN and the DoD  Obligating Document number and any other information required by  DFAS in the Transaction Description field on the IPAC transaction.

The text (if any) in MISCELLANEOUS INFO (1) will be included in  the Miscellaneous Information block of the IPAC transaction.   Miscellaneous Information may be used to specify the address of the military treatment facility that is being paid and/or a point of contact at DFAS.

The text (if any) in MISCELLANEOUS INFO (2) will be included in  the Miscellaneous Information block of the IPAC transaction immediately after the text from MISCELLANEOUS INFO (1).   Miscellaneous Information may be used to specify the address of the military treatment facility that is being paid and/or a point of contact at DFAS.
